# orm-auth-current-user-agent

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the currentUserAgent query

## Usage

```typescript
db.query.currentUserAgent().execute()
```

## Examples

### Run currentUserAgent

```typescript
const result = await db.query.currentUserAgent().execute();
```
